sources.quote: Psychotherapy (talk therapy) under the care of a mental health provider can help you recognize and change troubling emotions, thoughts, and behaviors.

factsExtracted.value: CBT for depression, Talk therapy for depression
Psychotherapy (talk therapy) under the care of a mental health provider can help you recognize and change troubling emotions, thoughts, and behaviors.
This may be done one-on-one or in a group setting. It can give you and your family support, education, skills, and coping strategies.
